creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

there are a couple of minor issues with this update:

- The %%DATADIR%% macro was removed from pkg-plist without obvious reason.
  Could you re-add it?
- Same for USE_LDCONFIG in Makefile.

In general, it's considered good practice to run "portlint -a" (portlint
is in the ports collection) in the port's directory before sending a patch
to see if the port roughly conforms to FreeBSD standards.

The rest looked good - could you send me an updated patch so I can commit
it?

Regards and thanks,
Stefan
